subcodes.first_line: O Seyyed of the Worshippers! Although those books and tablets were jewel-laden scrolls and a mighty treasure, yet their essence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سیدالعابدین هر چند آن کتب و صحائف صفائح جواهر بود و کنزی عظیم ولی اصل آن
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @recompense; reward for belief; right action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
